news.paragraph: Recent clinical trial data for Eli Lilly indicates that Foundayo and lower-dose Zepbound can provide durable weight-loss maintenance. This news supports a potential shift toward oral obesity treatments and reinforces the company's growth profile. Options traders should weigh these positive clinical outcomes and the evolving obesity drug landscape when evaluating upcoming volatility.
headlines: Eli Lilly Says Newly Approved Foundayo, Lower-Dose Zepbound Help Sustain Weight Loss
Eli Lilly Says Foundayo, Lower-Dose Zepbound Provided Durable Weight-Loss Maintenance in 2 Trials
Eli Lilly Obesity Data Support Oral Shift And Undervalued Growth Story
